title: Iodine Trichloride as a Volumetric Reagent. Part II. Determination of Thiourea and its Organic Derivatives
author: Balwant Singh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Iodine trichloride has been used as a volumetric reagent for the determination of thiourea and its many organic alkyl and aryl derivatives both by visual and potentiometric titration methods.
steps_raw: Iodine trichloride has been used as a volumetric reagent for the determination of thiourea and its many organic alkyl and aryl derivatives both by visual and potentiometric titration methods.
